entry.title: IDC 36C10X19D0011 (P00010) awarded to VETERANS EVALUATION SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS (MDES) UNDER SECTION 504 OF THE VETERANS BENEFITS IMPROVEMENTS ACT OF 1996 (PUBLIC LAW 104 275 38 U.S.C. 5101), REGION 4 (PACIFIC)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
